meta.note: [provenance:hand-derived §6.16 + AOZORA-ANNOTATION 2026-06-17] 上付き小文字 (superscript) is a forward-reference emphasis-page family (https://www.aozora.gr.jp/annotation/etc.html), particle は, single target, inline. Per §7.5 it consumes the immediately preceding target literal ２ (byte 3) and yields an emphasis node over ｅ²; §8 reference rendering is <sup class="aozora-superscript">. Offsets computed from the §3 byte model (each fullwidth char = 3 bytes); cross-checked against the reference processor. New family — no prior implementation-derived draft.
